_meta.source: Owner-approved messaging taxonomy rulings, 2026-07-21 (Step 2 pattern worksheet).
_meta.note: Presentation overlay for Stage-1 results. Header is set by category. Body = the cell’s stored `rec` prose VERBATIM (whitespace/punctuation cleanup only) EXCEPT Category 5, whose body is AUTHORED here. The rec-vs-(rec+reason) body-field choice is deferred to UI wiring. NOT wired to the UI yet. Keyed "product|role" to the 129 cells. See docs/DATA_LINEAGE.md and docs/PUBLIC_MESSAGE_TAXONOMY_REVIEW.md.

2.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

3.header: This does not work in this product
3.note: Defined in the taxonomy; NO cells in the canonical matrix. Do not populate by reclassifying (that edits decision content).

5.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
5.template: For [role] in [product], the required form is [X]. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

6.header: This needs testing in the finished product

4A.note: Defined in the taxonomy; NO cells in the canonical matrix. Do not populate by reclassifying.

4B.header: This role does not apply to this product

ambiguous.header: This name can refer to more than one botanical
ambiguous.note: Identity-unresolved. Candidates shown "Common name — Latin name" via the resolver display-name logic; Latin-only if no safe common name; never guess; never show canonical IDs/counts.

rtd-clear|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

rtd-clear|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
rtd-clear|flavour.body: For flavour in a clear RTD, the required form is a water-soluble liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

rtd-clear|colour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
rtd-clear|colour.body: For colour in a clear RTD, the required form is a water-soluble permitted colour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

rtd-cloudy|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

rtd-cloudy|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
rtd-cloudy|flavour.body: For flavour in a cloudy / suspension RTD, the required form is a water-soluble or emulsified liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

drops-aq|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

drops-aq|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
drops-aq|flavour.body: For flavour in aqueous / hydroalcoholic drops, the required form is a water-soluble liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

syrup|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

syrup|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
syrup|flavour.body: For flavour in a uniform-solution syrup, the required form is a water-soluble liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

spray|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

spray|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
spray|flavour.body: For flavour in an oral spray, the required form is a water-soluble liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

shot|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

shot|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
shot|flavour.body: For flavour in a shot / concentrate, the required form is a water-soluble or emulsified liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

bakery|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

confectionery|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

confectionery|colour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
confectionery|colour.body: For colour in a fat-based confectionery coating, the required form is an oil-dispersible permitted colour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.

dairy|base.header: This function is handled elsewhere in the product

dairy|flavour.header: The same type of ingredient is used for any botanical here
dairy|flavour.body: For flavour in a dairy or plant-milk product, the required form is a water-soluble or emulsified liquid flavour. The botanical you choose does not change that requirement.
